plan.costEstimationNote: This is the maximum estimated cost to the workspace for this plan. Price the plan accordingly. This estimation is based on the maximum number of users you defined, with each user consuming the full token limit. This scenario is unlikely to happen, so the actual cost is expected to be lower than the estimated amount.

themeSettings.logoUploadHint: Recommended: Square image (e.g., 200x200px). Supports PNG, JPG, WEBP. Max 10 MB — images are automatically compressed and saved as PNG.
themeSettings.enableSidebarGradientHint: Adds a subtle light gradient from the bottom of the sidebar for better visual depth.
themeSettings.gradientHueRotationHint: Adjust the color shift of the bottom gradient light.
themeSettings.gradientHeightHint: Controls how far up the sidebar the gradient extends.
themeSettings.maskOpacityHint: Adjusts the intensity of the gradient fade at the bottom.

tokenLimits.title: Model, Token & Billing Settings
tokenLimits.globalAiMentorPromptDescription: This prompt is added to the beginning of EVERY AI Mentor's instructions. Use it to enforce universal rules, safety guidelines, or core behaviors that all mentors must follow, regardless of their specific persona.
tokenLimits.globalSystemPromptPlaceholder: e.g., You are an AI assistant. You must never give medical advice. If a user expresses suicidal ideation, you must immediately provide a crisis hotline number and cease the conversation.
tokenLimits.proModelNameDescription: Used for AI Mentor chat, insight extraction, and complex generation.
tokenLimits.flashModelNameDescription: Used for lesson chat, media transcription, and faster, simpler tasks.
tokenLimits.costBreakdownDescription: Set the raw cost from the provider and your profit margin.
tokenLimits.currentlySavedCost: Currently saved total cost is ${{cost}}. Enter a new breakdown to update.
tokenLimits.tokensPerLessonDescription: Set the number of tokens allocated for each lesson included in a one-time plan.
tokenLimits.generalAiMentorTokensDescription: Set a base number of tokens for general AI Mentor usage, added on top of the lesson tokens.
tokenLimits.monthlyTokenLimitDescription: Set the maximum number of tokens a single user on a subscription plan can consume per month.

billing.pageTitlePlaceholder: e.g., Select The Best Plan for you
billing.linkedPlanHint: Select which actual plan this card connects to.
billing.wpPluginDescription: Download the official Gymind plugin to integrate your WooCommerce store for automated user provisioning when a product is purchased.
billing.pluginApiKeyDescription: Use this API key to connect external services like WooCommerce to your workspace for automated user provisioning and billing management.
billing.regenerateApiKeyWarning: Regenerating your key will invalidate the old one. You must update it in any connected services.
billing.regenKeyModalMessage: Are you sure? Your current API key will be immediately invalidated. You will need to update it in all external applications (like your WooCommerce store) to restore functionality.
billing.confirmPlanArchiveMessage: Are you sure you want to archive the "{{name}}" plan?
billing.planDependencyWarning: This plan is assigned to {{count}} workspace(s):
billing.removePublicPlanMessage: Are you sure you want to remove this plan from the public page? This will not delete the plan itself, just its public listing.
billing.maxPublicPlansReached: Maximum number of public plans reached
billing.paymentLinkTooltip: Share this link with customers to process payments
billing.title: Billing Management

chat.accessDenied: Access Denied. Only admins can manage chat settings.
chat.title: AI Mentor Settings
chat.pageDescription: Create and manage AI Mentors. Each can have its own instructions and insight extraction rules.
chat.noMentorsDescription: Get started by creating your first AI Mentor.
chat.mentorNameTooltip: The display name for this chat persona visible to users on their dashboard and chat selection screen (e.g., 'Anxiety Coach', 'Sleep Specialist').
chat.descriptionTooltip: A brief subtitle shown on the Chat card to help users understand what this persona helps with (e.g., 'Helps you understand and manage anxiety triggers').
chat.personaPreambleTooltip: Defines the AI's personality, tone, and role. This sets the stage for how it speaks. (e.g., 'You are an empathetic, Socratic therapist who asks deep questions' or 'You are a stern but encouraging fitness coach').
chat.enableInitialMessageTooltip: If enabled, the AI will send the first message to start the conversation. If disabled, it waits for the user to speak first.
chat.initialMessagePlaceholder: e.g., Hello! How can I help you today?
chat.systemPromptTooltip: This is the 'brain' of the chat. It contains detailed instructions on how the AI should behave, what methodology to use (e.g., CBT, Socratic method), step-by-step rules for the conversation flow, and the ultimate goal of the session.
chat.includePersonalization: Include User's Personalized Data in Prompt
chat.includePersonalizationTooltip: If checked, the system will automatically inject the user's past questionnaire results (e.g., 'High Anxiety Score') and summaries from previous conversations into the prompt. This allows the AI to 'remember' the user and tailor its advice.
chat.dataExtractionTooltip: Data extraction allows you to save structured data from the chat. For example, if you define a field 'Main Complaint', the AI will attempt to identify the user's complaint text and save it to their profile for future tracking.
chat.summaryInstructionsTooltip: Define exactly what the AI should output after it detects the extraction fields. For example: 'Present a bulleted summary of the findings' or 'Suggest 3 homework exercises based on the identified pattern'.
chat.summaryInstructionsDisabledNote: These instructions are only used when at least one Extraction Field is enabled above.
chat.aiInsightsTooltip: Unlike Data Extraction (which finds existing text), Generated Insights ask the AI to analyze the conversation and create *new* conclusions. For example, you can ask the AI to generate a 'Suggested Action Plan' based on the chat.
chat.confirmArchiveMessage: Are you sure you want to archive the "{{name}}" AI Mentor?
chat.dependencyWarning: This AI Mentor is currently used in {{count}} plan(s):
chat.mentorSaveFailed: Failed to save mentor. Please try again.
chat.docFileNotSupported: Legacy .doc files are not supported. Please save as .docx, .pdf, or .txt.
chat.unsupportedFileType: Unsupported file type. Please use .txt, .docx, or .pdf.

validation.systemPromptRequired: Main Chat System Prompt is required.
validation.initialMessageRequired: Initial Message cannot be empty when it is enabled.
validation.extractionFieldLabelRequired: Label for enabled Extraction Field {{index}} cannot be empty.
validation.aiInsightPromptRequired: AI Instructions for Generating Insights is required when any AI Insight is enabled.
validation.aiInsightLabelRequired: Label for enabled AI Insight {{index}} cannot be empty.

questionnaire.shuffleQuestionsTooltip: When checked, all questions from all categories will be displayed in a random order each time the questionnaire is taken.
questionnaire.numberOfTopCategories: Number of Top Categories to Show
questionnaire.includeTiesTooltip: If checked, categories with the same score are counted as one rank.
questionnaire.saveToInsights: Save top categories to Personal Insights
questionnaire.saveToInsightsTooltip: If checked, the top categories identified for a user will be saved and displayed on their main dashboard.
questionnaire.correctAnswerTooltip: The AI will use this text to grade the student's answer. It will check how many key facts from this answer are present in the student's response.
questionnaire.correctAnswerPlaceholder: Enter the full, correct answer here...

bridge.title: Self-Hosted Video Settings
bridge.securityKeyDescription: Share this key with your IT team. It must be configured in the bridge server.
bridge.regenerateWarning: Regenerating will invalidate all existing bridge servers using the old key. They will need to be reconfigured. Continue?
bridge.installDescription: Download a zip with the bridge server and platform-specific installer, or the bridge file with a setup guide.
bridge.installNote: Extract the zip, run the install script, and a setup wizard will guide you through configuration.

lesson.bridgeVideoHost: Video is hosted on the workspace's secure server
lesson.videoUrlPlaceholder: https://player.vimeo.com/video/... or https://youtube.com/embed/... or any public video URL
lesson.videoTranscriptTooltip: Paste the full video transcript here. The AI uses it to answer learner questions and generate quiz questions. You can also upload a video or audio file to auto-transcribe.
lesson.transcriptPlaceholder: Paste the full video transcript here for the AI, or upload a video/audio file to transcribe...
lesson.lessonAssignmentsTooltip: Assignments are activities attached to this lesson — AI mentor chats, questionnaires, or custom HTML exercises. They can be set as mandatory and can auto-open at a specific point during the video.
lesson.insightsPrivateTooltip: If checked, AI-generated insights from this chat are private to the user.
lesson.autoOpenTooltip: If enabled, this assignment will automatically pop up and pause the video at the specified timestamp.
lesson.openAiWizard: Open AI wizard to generate HTML
lesson.closeButtonIdTooltip: Provide the HTML 'id' of a button inside your custom code. When clicked, it marks the assignment as complete and closes it. Required when the assignment is marked as mandatory.
lesson.insightSavingFieldsTooltip: Define fields to automatically save user input from your custom HTML assignment to their personal insights profile. For example, you can save their answers from a text box or a selection from a dropdown.
lesson.htmlPlaceholder: Structural HTML (no <style> or <script> blocks — use the CSS and JS tabs)
lesson.previewSandboxMessage: This is a sandbox preview. The save/submit action was triggered, but insights cannot be saved in preview mode. This will work normally for learners in the actual lesson.

error.questionValidation: Each question requires text, at least two non-empty answers, and a correct answer to be marked.

error.transcribeFailed: Failed to transcribe media. File might be corrupt or too long (max ~40 mins of audio).

error.unsupportedFileType: Unsupported file type. Please use .txt, .docx, or .pdf.
error.noTranscriptForAi: Please provide a transcript for the AI to generate a question from.

wizard.includePersonalization: Include User's Personalized Data in Prompt
wizard.unsupportedFileType: Unsupported file type. Please use .txt, .docx, or .pdf.
wizard.extractionDisabledNote: These instructions are only used when at least one Extraction Field is enabled above.
wizard.initMessageCreate: Hello! I'm here to help you build a new AI Mentor. You can tell me what kind of mentor you want to create and what its main purpose is and I will fill out the data fields for you. From there, you can ask me to refine and improve it, or edit everything manually to match your exact vision.
wizard.initMessageEdit: I've loaded the data for "{{name}}". You can ask me to make any changes—for example, "Update the system prompt to focus more on CBT techniques" or "Make the persona more empathetic". You can also edit the fields directly on the right.
wizard.errorMessage: I'm sorry, I encountered an error processing your request. Please try again.
wizard.fileImportSuccess: I've successfully imported the content from "{{fileName}}" into the System Prompt (Database). You can now ask me to refine the mentor based on this knowledge base.
wizard.initialMessagePlaceholder: e.g., Hello! How can I help you today?
wizard.summaryInstructionsPlaceholder: e.g., Present a bulleted summary of the findings.
wizard.aiInsightPromptPlaceholder: e.g., Based on the conversation, generate a suggested action plan.

tooltip.mentorName: The display name for this chat persona visible to users on their dashboard and chat selection screen (e.g., 'Anxiety Coach', 'Sleep Specialist').
tooltip.description: A brief subtitle shown on the Chat card to help users understand what this persona helps with (e.g., 'Helps you understand and manage anxiety triggers').
tooltip.personaPreamble: Defines the AI's personality, tone, and role. This sets the stage for how it speaks. (e.g., 'You are an empathetic, Socratic therapist who asks deep questions' or 'You are a stern but encouraging fitness coach').
tooltip.initialMessage: If enabled, the AI will send the first message to start the conversation. If disabled, it waits for the user to speak first.
tooltip.systemPrompt: This is the 'brain' of the chat. It contains detailed instructions on how the AI should behave, what methodology to use (e.g., CBT, Socratic method), step-by-step rules for the conversation flow, and the ultimate goal of the session.
tooltip.dataExtraction: Data extraction allows you to save structured data from the chat. For example, if you define a field 'Main Complaint', the AI will attempt to identify the user's complaint text and save it to their profile for future tracking.
tooltip.summaryInstructions: Define exactly what the AI should output after it detects the extraction fields. For example: 'Present a bulleted summary of the findings' or 'Suggest 3 homework exercises based on the identified pattern'.
tooltip.includePersonalization: If checked, the system will automatically inject the user's past questionnaire results (e.g., 'High Anxiety Score') and summaries from previous conversations into the prompt. This allows the AI to 'remember' the user and tailor its advice.
tooltip.aiGeneratedInsights: Unlike Data Extraction (which finds existing text), Generated Insights ask the AI to analyze the conversation and create *new* conclusions. For example, you can ask the AI to generate a 'Suggested Action Plan' based on the chat.
